summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Ecoandes Iteration 2 features completed. All new features working correctly: Hero carousel with 5 slides and auto-rotation, persistent SearchBar with live autocomplete, mobile menu with solid backgrounds, cookie banner RGPD/LSSI-CE compliant, Blog pages (6 articles), Certifications page, Customer Service page with 6 FAQs, 4 legal pages, Account page with 3 quick-access cards, and all footer links.
critical_code_review_comments: All new components properly implemented with data-testid attributes for testing
Cookie banner correctly implements RGPD/LSSI-CE compliance with localStorage persistence
SearchBar uses efficient in-memory caching for autocomplete with 100ms debounce
Mobile menu has solid backgrounds (bg-bone-100 and bg-white) for proper text contrast
Hero carousel uses framer-motion for smooth transitions with 4s auto-rotation interval
All legal pages properly structured with sections
Footer contains all required links with proper data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: None needed - using existing data from iteration 1
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 2 frontend features verified working: Hero carousel (5 slides, dots clickable, auto-rotation pauses on hover), SearchBar (persistent on all pages, live autocomplete with 'quinoa' and 'harina' queries, navigation to /tienda?q=... and /producto/...), Mobile menu (solid bg-bone-100 header, solid bg-white nav links, proper borders), Cookie banner (appears on first visit, 3 buttons work, settings panel with toggles, consent persisted in localStorage), Blog (6 cards, BlogPost with sections and related products), Certifications (4 seal cards), CustomerService (email/phone/hours, 6 FAQs), Legal pages (4 pages all loading), Account page (3 quick-access cards, cart drawer opens on click), Footer (all 13 required links present).
